audit_status.source_base: Greek Gospel text tradition, draft aligned to public-domain comparison layer later
audit_status.review_note: Compact complete draft reviewed for stumbling, release/forgiveness, mustard trust, servant saying, ten lepers, Samaritan gratitude, reign within/among, and days of Son of Humanity.

verses.restored: He said to his disciples, It is impossible for stumbling-blocks not to come, but woe to the one through whom they come.
It would be better for that one if a millstone were hung around the neck and one were thrown into the sea than to cause one of these little ones to stumble.
Watch yourselves. If your sibling sins/misaligns, rebuke that one; and if that one turns/realigns, release that one.
If seven times in the day that one sins/misaligns against you, and seven times turns back to you saying, I turn/realign, you shall release that one.
The apostles said to the Lord, Add trust to us.
The Lord said, If you have trust like a mustard seed, you would say to this mulberry tree, Be uprooted and planted in the sea, and it would obey you.
Which of you, having a servant plowing or shepherding, who comes in from the field, will say to him, Come immediately and recline?
Will he not say to him, Prepare something for me to eat, gird yourself, and serve me until I eat and drink; afterward you will eat and drink?
Does he thank the servant because he did the things commanded?
So also you, when you have done all the things commanded you, say, We are unprofitable servants; what we were obligated to do, we have done.
It happened, as he was going to Jerusalem, that he was passing through the middle of Samaria and Galilee.
As he entered a certain village, ten men with skin disease met him, standing at a distance.
They lifted up their voices, saying, Jesus, Master, have mercy on us.
Seeing them, he said, Go show yourselves to the priests. And it happened, as they went, they were cleansed.
One of them, seeing that he was healed, returned, glorifying the Divine with a great voice.
He fell on his face at Jesus' feet, giving thanks to him; and he was a Samaritan.
Jesus answered, Were not ten cleansed? Where are the nine?
Were none found returning to give glory to the Divine except this foreigner?
He said to him, Rise and go; your trust has saved/healed you.
Being questioned by the Pharisees when the reign of the Divine comes, he answered them, The reign of the Divine does not come with observable watching.
Nor will they say, Look, here, or, There; for look, the reign of the Divine is within/among you.
He said to the disciples, Days will come when you will desire to see one of the days of the Son of Humanity, and you will not see it.
They will say to you, Look, there, or, Look, here. Do not go away or run after them.
For just as lightning flashing lights up from one side under heaven to the other, so will the Son of Humanity be in his day.
But first it is necessary for him to suffer many things and be rejected by this generation.
Just as it happened in the days of Noah, so also it will be in the days of the Son of Humanity.
They were eating, drinking, marrying, and being given in marriage, until the day Noah entered the ark, and the flood came and destroyed them all.
Likewise, just as it happened in the days of Lot: they were eating, drinking, buying, selling, planting, building.
But on the day Lot went out from Sodom, fire and sulfur rained from heaven and destroyed them all.
According to these things it will be on the day the Son of Humanity is revealed.
On that day, let the one on the roof, with goods in the house, not go down to take them; likewise the one in the field must not turn back.
Remember Lot's wife.
Whoever seeks to preserve one's life/soul will lose it, and whoever loses it will keep it alive.
I say to you, in that night two will be in one bed; one will be taken and the other left.
Two women will be grinding together; one will be taken and the other left.
[Some later manuscripts add: Two will be in a field; one will be taken and the other left.]
Answering, they said to him, Where, Lord? He said to them, Where the body is, there also the vultures/eagles will be gathered.
